title: FAMILY WELLNESS PROGRAM - 211info
text: COLONIA AMISTAD FAMILY WELLNESS PROGRAM Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Helps people access community resources such as food, health care, and civil rights education. Also provides advocacy, case management, and referrals to local partners. Assists with preparing documents and completing forms for public benefits, legal issues, passports, DMV, medical, rental, and job applications. Services include Power of Attorney, travel consent for minors, translations, and notarization. 30 S Gun Club Road Independence, OR 97351 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Monday-Friday 9am-5pm, or by appointment Email (503) 917-8024 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (503) 917-8024 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for an appointment. Walk-ins may be accepted on a case-by-case basis. FEES: Varies by service DOCUMENTS: None LANGUAGES: English, Spanish, interpretation by arrangement AREA SERVED: Polk County Services: Case/Care Management * Parents of Infants/Toddlers * Families with Children Certificates/Forms Assistance * Hispanic/Latino Community Language Translation Navigator Programs Notary Public Services Specialized Information and Referral * Hispanic/Latino Community Subject Specific Public Awareness/Education * Civil Rights Issues Other Services Offered At This Location: INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - PARENTING SUPPORT INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - POSITIVE YOUTH DEVELOPMENT If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. COLONIA AMISTAD
